response.justification: Candidate is wildly overqualified for a junior/mid role — 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior titles across multiple companies, with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS exposure. Technical fit is excellent but seniority mismatch raises real concerns about retention, salary expectations, and engagement with entry-level scope. PostgreSQL is not explicitly listed (MongoDB/MySQL/SQL instead), and German is only basic which may matter for the on-site, German-market construction/energy domain. Worth a screening call to clarify motivation for a downlevel and compensation alignment.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React fullstack experience across multiple production platforms
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) matching the 'clean software architecture' interest
AI/LLM and MCP tooling experience aligns with nice-to-have LLM integration qualification
concerns: Massive seniority overshoot for an entry-level IC role — likely flight risk and salary mismatch
Only basic German despite high on-site presence in German renewable/construction domain
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL only); no AWS ECS/EKS/Terraform or Nest.js mentioned

key_factors.factor: Basic German for on-site German-market role
